# Tables {.unnumbered}

![](table_images/table1_characteristics.png){width=100%}

\newpage

![](table_images/table2_efficacy.png){width=100%}

\newpage

![](table_images/table3_safety.png){width=100%}

\newpage

# Supplementary Tables {.unnumbered}

![](table_images/supptable1_pcr.png){width=100%}

\newpage

![](table_images/supptable2_efs.png){width=100%}

\newpage

![](table_images/supptable3_os.png){width=100%}
